recommendations.title: Castle in the Sky
recommendations.overview: A young boy and a girl with a magic crystal must race against pirates and foreign agents in a search for a legendary floating castle.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Return
recommendations.overview: A young man returns home for the weekend to discover the difficulty of juggling friends, parents, magic mushrooms and several thousand chickens.

recommendations.title: Cinco de Mayo: The Battle
recommendations.overview: On May 5th, 1862, a few thousand Mexican soldiers put their lives on the line against the world's largest and most powerful army in one legendary battle for freedom and for Mexico.

recommendations.overview: Determined teen Din is longing to reconnect with his childhood best friend when he meets a wish-granting dragon who shows him the magic of possibilities.

recommendations.title: Wizards of Waverly Place: Wizard School
recommendations.overview: When Alex is caught using magic to clean her room she is forced to go to wizard school with Justin. Max and Jerry camp out on the terrace to prove their manhood.
